word: H8464 - תַּחְמָס - tachmâç - takh-mawce' - Night hawk

sections.paragraph:
Original: תּחמס

Transliteration: tachmâs

Phonetic: takh-mawce'

BDB Definition:

  1. a ceremonially unclean bird
    1. a name of the male ostrich
    2. (CLBL) probably the great owl
    3. perhaps an extinct bird, exact meaning unknown

Origin: from H2554

TWOT entry: 678b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
